name: Meatball Shakshuka
purpose: Savory breakfast using Greek turkey meatballs.
instructions: Add chopped tomatoes/passata to a pan with paprika, oregano, and black pepper.
Simmer on medium heat for 3-4 minutes.
Add meatballs and warm through for 2-3 minutes.
Make 3 small wells and crack in the eggs.
Cover with lid and cook 4-6 minutes until whites are set.
Serve with toast or flatbread if extra carbs are needed.
reheating: Not recommended after eggs are cooked.
substitutions: More tomatoes can be used if a saucier breakfast is preferred.
meal_prep_notes: Keep meatballs cooked and tomato sauce available; add eggs fresh.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: High-satiety breakfast aligned with the user's preference for omelets/meaty breakfasts.
